recommendations.title: The Thing About Harry
recommendations.overview: Two high school enemies, uber-jock Harry and out-and-proud Sam, are forced to share a car ride to their Missouri hometown for a friend's engagement party on Valentine's Day. Things take a turn when Sam learns Harry has come out.

recommendations.title: Arrival
recommendations.overview: Taking place after alien crafts land around the world, an expert linguist is recruited by the military to determine whether they come in peace or are a threat.

recommendations.title: Last Moment of Clarity

recommendations.title: Paris Express

recommendations.title: I Am Sam

recommendations.title: Gray Matters
recommendations.overview: Sam and Gray are such a well-matched pair that it is difficult to believe they are brother and sister rather than husband and wife. They both share a love of 1940s movies and dancing, and when they meet Charlie, they have something else in common: Th

recommendations.title: Tentacles
recommendations.genres: Horror, Romance, Science Fiction, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A young Los Angeles couple Tara and Sam fall head over heels into a new romance, entwining their lives—until their intimacy transforms into something terrifying.

recommendations.title: Switching Goals
recommendations.overview: Twin sisters Emma and Sam come up with a scheme to switch places so each can play in the soccer team they prefer.

recommendations.title: The Clinic
recommendations.overview: While traveling across country with her fiancé, Beth wakes alone in an isolated clinic to a mother's worst nightmare. Just how far will she go to save her child?

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.
